title: camissoniopsis bistorta
intro: Camissoniopsis bistorta, also known as the Western or mountain pride, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. The medicinal properties of Camissoniopsis bistorta include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Camissoniopsis bistorta include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
